name: Smartsheet
description: A cloud-based platform for work management and collaboration (sheets, reports, dashboards, automation, integrations).

auth_methods.note: Smartsheet supports OAuth 2.0 (Authorization Code flow) for integrations and user-generated API Access Tokens used as Bearer tokens in the Authorization header.

credential_access.note: Personal API access tokens are generated from a user account (Account > Apps & Integrations > API Access). The Help Center shows how an individual user creates tokens from their account, implying self-service access for account holders. Pricing page does not indicate partner gating or paid-only restriction.

api_surface.note: Official REST API reference lists broad resource coverage (sheets, rows, columns, users, workspaces, webhooks, attachments, etc.) and links to SDKs for multiple languages.

buildability.note: Public REST API docs are available and developers can self-generate an API access token or use OAuth 2.0 to start building. SDKs and examples are provided.

queries: Smartsheet API access token how to obtain site:smartsheet.com
Smartsheet API docs authentication OAuth site:smartsheet.com
